chosen_action.title: Hide already-delivered comparison backlink packet during its active review window

summary: Patched the execution board so it no longer advertises the comparison backlink handoff packet after that exact manual-delivery asset was already sent on 2026-05-24 and is still inside its review window. This closes a fake-progress loop during measurement hold.
expected_outcome: Future hold-window runs stop resurfacing an already-delivered comparison packet and instead force a genuinely new lane or another process repair.

measurement_window.success_metric: marketing_execution_board_latest.md keeps the comparison packet hidden while the current manual-delivery window is active.
measurement_window.kill_condition: If the board resurfaces the packet before the review window expires without a changed prepared set, repair the comparison delivery guard again.
